contracts.project: TKI-ET City of McKinney Regional Airport FBO Project
contracts.notes: Construction administration and project management services for the McKinney Regional Airport FBO terminal project, including biweekly project meetings, RFI process coordination, and consultant team oversight through project completion by May 8, 2023.

contracts.project: McKinney Executive Terminal (TKI-ET City of McKinney Regional Airport FBO Project)
contracts.notes: Structural engineering consultation and site visit services to assist with finishing the McKinney Executive Terminal project.

contracts.project: TKI-ET City of McKinney Regional Airport FBO Project
contracts.notes: MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing) engineering services for the McKinney Regional Airport FBO terminal construction administration phase.

contracts.project: McKinney National Airport TKI Terminal/FBO
contracts.notes: Landscape architecture construction support services including coordination with design team, submittal review, site visits for irrigation installation observation, punch list verification, and record drawings.

contracts.project: TKI-ET City of McKinney Regional Airport FBO Project
contracts.notes: Construction Administration Phase Extension for FBO Terminal project, including project meetings, RFI process coordination, drawing reviews, and construction oversight services.

contracts.project: McKinney Executive Terminal
contracts.notes: Structural engineering consultation and site visits to assist with finishing the FBO Terminal project.

contracts.project: City of McKinney Facility Condition Assessment Services
contracts.limits: 66 buildings and structures at 36 different sites; 1,221,261 square feet of floor area
contracts.notes: Comprehensive facility condition assessment of City-owned buildings including inventory of building components, condition rating, deficiency documentation, cost estimates for repairs and replacements, and development of a 10-year capital improvement plan with lifecycle cost forecasting.

contracts.project: Facility Condition Assessment Services
contracts.notes: Comprehensive facility condition assessment of City of McKinney buildings including non-destructive visual inspections, component inventory, deficiency documentation, condition rating, work item creation, cost estimation, and multi-year maintenance forecasting across all municipal facilities.

contracts.project: Facility Condition Assessment Services
contracts.notes: Professional facility condition assessment services for City of McKinney owned buildings.

contracts.project: Citywide Inflow & Infiltration Sewer Basin Monitoring Project
contracts.notes: Consulting engineering services for citywide inflow and infiltration sewer basin monitoring, including study and evaluation of the sewer system.

contracts.project: Craig Ranch Soccer Complex - Field Renovation and Park Improvements (PK1906)
contracts.notes: Landscape architectural and engineering services for renovation of 7 fields and various park improvements at McKinney Soccer Complex at Craig Ranch.

contracts.project: 2023 Citywide Traffic Count Program
contracts.notes: Consulting engineering services to collect citywide traffic counts and develop a 2023 Citywide Traffic Count Map.

contracts.project: SH 5 Illumination Phase 2 (TR2356)
contracts.limits: State Highway 5 from Powerhouse Street to SH 121
contracts.notes: Professional services contract for architectural and engineering design of continuous roadway illumination along the SH 5 corridor concurrent with planned reconstruction by TxDOT.

contracts.project: East McKinney Drainage Study and Street Rehabilitation Project (DR2224 and ST2224)
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for a combined drainage study and street rehabilitation project in East McKinney, including design of drainage infrastructure and road improvements.

contracts.project: Intersection Capacity Improvements Project (ST2303)
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for intersection capacity improvements to address traffic congestion and increase intersection efficiency.

contracts.project: FY23 Combined Infrastructure Reconstruction (Tucker, Waddill) Project
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for the FY23 Combined Infrastructure Reconstruction project involving Tucker and Waddill streets, including street (ST), water (WA), and wastewater (WW) components.

contracts.project: DR2118 – Wattley Park Creek Bank Stabilization
contracts.notes: Design of creek bank stabilization at Wattley Park including grading plans, landfill debris removal, gabion wall construction, vegetation plan, USACOE/TCEQ permitting coordination, and hydraulic design to close out the Voluntary Cleanup Program.

contracts.project: Wattley Park Creek Bank Stabilization Measures Project (DR2118)
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for creek bank stabilization measures at Wattley Park, with authorization for supplemental agreements up to a total aggregate of $165,000.

contracts.project: Gerrish Pump Station Emergency Generator Project (WA2242)
contracts.notes: Professional engineering design services for the Gerrish Pump Station Emergency Generator Project, a wastewater infrastructure improvement.

contracts.project: Stonebridge 30-Inch Water Line - 920PP Project (WA1632)
contracts.notes: Professional engineering design services for the Stonebridge 30-inch waterline project, including design and engineering services for water infrastructure.

contracts.project: Wilson Creek Trunk Sewer Manhole Raising Project (CIP# WW2550)
contracts.notes: Professional engineering design services to raise 18 sanitary sewer manholes along the Wilson Creek Trunk Sewer by a minimum of 3 feet to prevent sanitary sewer overflows. Services include design evaluation, preliminary and final engineering plans, specifications, bid phase services, and construction administration.

contracts.project: Facilities Management and Airport HVAC Consulting
contracts.notes: HVAC consulting services split between Facilities Management ($39,420.05) and Airport ($9,108.00) for ongoing projects.

contracts.project: Airport HVAC Consulting
contracts.notes: Airport portion of HVAC consulting services.

contracts.project: McKinney Performing Arts Center (MPAC) Renovation
contracts.notes: Preparation of construction documents and construction administration services for the renovation of the McKinney Performing Arts Center, including exterior repairs, interior improvements, stage replacement, HVAC modifications, accessibility upgrades, and compliance with Texas Accessibility Standards and Texas Historical Commission requirements.

contracts.project: McKinney Performing Arts Center Renovation Project (FC2504)
contracts.notes: Design and architectural services for the renovation of the McKinney Performing Arts Center located at 111 N. Tennessee Street.

contracts.project: Citywide Inflow & Infiltration Sewer Basin Monitoring Project (WW2334)
contracts.notes: Consulting engineering services for citywide inflow and infiltration sewer basin monitoring to study and evaluate sewer system performance.

contracts.project: CIP project WW2334 – Citywide Inflow & Infiltration Sewer Basin Monitoring
contracts.notes: Long-term sewer flow monitoring program to identify sources of inflow and infiltration in the sewer system, deploy targeted I/I reduction strategies, and quantify the success of various I/I reduction strategies. Includes installation and monitoring of 30 flow meters and 7 rain gauges at citywide locations for 3 years, data analysis, and reporting.

contracts.project: Sewer System Smoke Testing - Basin 24
contracts.notes: Professional services for smoke testing of the sewer system including Basin 24 to identify deficiencies contributing to inflow and infiltration. Includes public relations, data management, defect analysis, and detailed reporting of findings.

contracts.project: Basin 24 Smoke Testing
contracts.notes: Smoke testing services to identify and reduce inflow and infiltration (I/I) sources entering the wastewater system in Basin 24, with documented locations and prioritized plan for improvements.

contracts.project: Eastside Infrastructure Development
contracts.notes: Architectural and engineering services for the Eastside Infrastructure Development project at McKinney airport, including terminal building, airside and landside infrastructure design.

contracts.project: Eastside Infrastructure Development
contracts.notes: Construction materials observation, engineering, and testing services for the Eastside Infrastructure Development project.

contracts.project: Eastside Infrastructure Development
contracts.notes: Systems commissioning services for the Eastside Infrastructure Development project.

contracts.project: Old Settler's Park Improvements
contracts.notes: Additional professional services for Old Settler's Park improvements including topographic surveying, environmental study with wetlands delineation and permitting, cultural resources survey, design of a skate spot structure with construction administration, and design of covered pickleball courts.

contracts.project: Towne Lake Zone 2 – Light Walk
contracts.notes: Construction Administration Services for Towne Lake Zone 2 – Light Walk, including periodic site visits, payment reviews, and substantial/final inspections.

contracts.project: Wilson Creek Greens Trail, Phase 2 - Trail (Hard-Surface) and Nature Trail (Soft-Surface) Improvements
contracts.notes: Design and construction document services for Wilson Creek Greens Trail Phase 2, including environmental assessments (threatened and endangered species, cultural resources, Phase 1 site assessment, wetland delineation), surveying services (topographic survey, boundary verification, tree survey), and landscape design services (schematic design through construction administration) for both hard-surface hike/bike trail and soft-surface nature trail improvements.

contracts.project: McKinney Downtown Fire Sprinkler Project
contracts.notes: Fire protection engineering services for schematic design of fire sprinkler systems in nine historic downtown buildings in McKinney. Services include as-built documentation data collection, AutoCAD drawing creation, and fire sprinkler schematic design across multiple building blocks.

contracts.project: Taxiway C & FM 546 Roundabout - Terminal Area Services and Construction Administration
contracts.notes: Additional terminal area services, construction administration, and resident project representation for the Taxiway C and FM 546 Roundabout project at McKinney Airport.

contracts.project: McKinney National Airport Eastside Development - Supplemental No. 2
contracts.notes: Professional services for McKinney National Airport Eastside Development improvements including design services for Taxiway C and new airport entrance roundabout off FM 546, terminal area updates, commercial service development, surveying, construction administration, on-site resident project representative services, and project closeout.

contracts.project: 2025 Roadway Impact Fee Study (Project ST2518)
contracts.notes: Consulting engineering and planning services to conduct a comprehensive roadway impact fee study and update, as mandated by Texas Local Government Code every five years.

contracts.company: Parkhill, Smith & Cooper, Inc. dba Parkhill
contracts.project: Master Site Planning Project for 111 Acre Multidisciplinary Civic Campus
contracts.notes: Architectural and engineering services for master site planning of a 111-acre multidisciplinary civic campus in McKinney.

contracts.project: Towne Lake Park
contracts.notes: Professional planning and engineering services for Towne Lake Park development.

contracts.project: Master Site Planning for 111 Acre Multidisciplinary Civic Campus
contracts.limits: 111 acres on the east side of FM 1461 near the intersection of Baxter Well Road
contracts.notes: Master site planning study for a civic campus including a new multigenerational recreation center with aquatics, a new public works campus, and a new water pump station with associated infrastructure. The study will establish a coordinated, long-range planning framework that defines land use, circulation, utilities, environmental constraints, phasing, and order of magnitude costs.

contracts.project: Stonebridge Drive (US 380 to Bloomdale Road) Project
contracts.notes: Professional engineering design services for Stonebridge Drive roadway project extending from US 380 to Bloomdale Road. [Firm corrected: Resolution names Kimley-Horn, not CP&Y/STV]

contracts.notes: Phase I professional architectural and engineering services for the Downtown McKinney Parking Structure Project. [Phase I only; full project $2.16M]

contracts.project: Wattley Park
contracts.notes: Professional architectural and engineering design services for Wattley Park. [Supplemental increase; new total NTE $227,870]

contracts.project: Downtown McKinney Parking Structure and Central Park Relocation Project

contracts.notes: Professional design services for a multi-level parking structure in downtown McKinney with relocation of Central Park. Services include architecture, structural engineering, MEP engineering, parking consulting, civil engineering, and landscape architecture with construction administration.

contracts.project: McKinney National Airport Commercial Terminal (AI2250)
contracts.notes: Construction Materials Observation, Engineering and Testing (CMT) services for the design and construction of the McKinney National Airport Commercial Terminal.

contracts.project: Traffic Signals at Two Locations Along Bloomdale Road
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for the design of traffic signals at two locations along Bloomdale Road in McKinney.

contracts.notes: Professional engineering design services for a grade separation project at the intersection of Wilmeth Road and McIntyre Road.

contracts.project: Sanitary Sewer Main CIPP Lining (FY25) Project
contracts.notes: Professional engineering design services for sanitary sewer main rehabilitation using cured-in-place pipe (CIPP) lining technology.

contracts.project: Multigenerational Recreation Center Feasibility Study
contracts.notes: Planning and engineering services related to a feasibility study for the development of a multigenerational recreation center.

contracts.notes: Supplemental professional engineering design services for the expansion of lanes 3 and 4 on Silverado Trail. [Supplemental: NTE increase from $900K to $950K]

contracts.notes: Supplemental professional engineering design services for the realignment of James Pitts Drive. [Supplemental: NTE increase from $650K to $700K]

contracts.notes: Professional engineering design services for the Wilmeth Road – McIntyre Road Grade Separation project (CIP Project ST2552).
